name: SAP Fieldglass Approval API Examples
description: Request examples for the SAP Fieldglass Approval API

examples.summary: Get a list of items that require approval
examples.description: Returns a list of work items requiring approval action.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access. Required for production access.

examples.summary: Get items that require approval for a module
examples.description: Returns a list of work items requiring approval action, filtered down to a specific module.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access. Required for production access.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: The ID for the module (for example, 40 for Job Posting or 270 for Work Order). A full list can be found in the supporting documentation.

examples.description: Take action on the work item by either approving or rejecting it.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access. Required for production access.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: The ID for the module (for example, 40 for Job Posting or 270 for Work Order). A full list can be found in the supporting documentation.

parameters.name: workItemId
parameters.description: The ID of the work item. You can get this from the response received when getting the list of items that require approval.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The action to take on the work item. This can be either ''approve'' or ''reject''. If it is reject, the reasonId is required.

parameters.name: reasonId
parameters.description: The reasonId for the rejection. This is required when the action is 'reject'. You can get a list of rejection reasons available for the module from the response when getting rejection reasons.

examples.description: Returns details for a specific work item.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access. Required for production access.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: The ID for the module (for example, 40 for Job Posting or 270 for Work Order). A full list can be found in the supporting documentation.

parameters.name: workItemId
parameters.description: The ID of the work item.

examples.description: Returns all configured work item rejection reasons by module.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access. Required for production access.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: The ID for the module (for example, 40 for Job Posting or 270 for Work Order). A full list can be found in the supporting documentation.
